## Summary

Provide a concise description of the change and the motivation.

## Related issues
Link any related issue numbers.

## How to test
Provide steps to reproduce and verify the change locally. Include commands, expected output, and any caveats.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles and runs (npm run dev)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (npm run typecheck)
- [ ] Linting passes (npm run lint)
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
- [ ] Changes are atomic and well-described in commits

Thank you for your contribution!
